{{Expand}}

{{Infobox construct
| name = Malice's Remnant
| introduced = Waybound
}}

== Waybound ==
{{spoiler|book=cradle-12-waybound|[[Malice's Remnant]] began torturing and killing innocent people during her advancement.<ref name="cradle-12-waybound-c26">''Waybound'', chapter 26</ref>}}

== Notes ==
<references />

{{Cradle nav}}

[[Category:Constructs]]
[[Category:Waybound]]
[[Category:Cradle]]
